title: Craftformers: Allspark
description: Craftformers: Allspark  This is an add-on to the original Craftformers mod
body:
**Craftformers: Allspark **
This is an add-on to the original Craftformers mod

**Our mod includes**: 
Optimus Prime's Star Sword
Megatron's Dark Star Sword
Phase Switch

**Abilities**:
Star Sword: 14 damage
Dark Star Sword: 15 damage

Phase switching: 
SHIFT + Right button: Change the way you move 
Right button: Turn the phase switch on or off
Moving ways: Horizontal/Vertical

**Mod version**: 1.0.5
**Languages**: English/Russian

**NOTE**: The product description is in Russian, but the next update will be in English.
